                  "BatteryReport":  "battery-report.html",
                  "Availability":  "The following sleep states are available on this system:\r\n    Standby (S0 Low Power Idle) Network Connected\r\n    Hibernate\r\n    Fast Startup\r\n\r\nThe following sleep states are not available on this system:\r\n    Standby (S1)\r\n\tThe system firmware does not support this standby state.\r\n\tThis standby state is disabled when S0 low power idle is supported.\r\n\r\n    Standby (S2)\r\n\tThe system firmware does not support this standby state.\r\n\tThis standby state is disabled when S0 low power idle is supported.\r\n\r\n    Standby (S3)\r\n\tThe system firmware does not support this standby state.\r\n\tThis standby state is disabled when S0 low power idle is supported.\r\n\r\n    Hybrid Sleep\r\n\tStandby (S3) is not available.\r\n\tThe hypervisor does not support this standby state.\r\n\r\n",
                  "EnergyReport":  "energy-report.html",
                  "Plans":  "\r\nExisting Power Schemes (* Active)\r\n-----------------------------------\r\nPower Scheme GUID: 381b4222-f694-41f0-9685-ff5bb260df2e  (Dengeli) *\r\n"
              },

                           "Bcdedit":  "\r\nWindows Boot Manager\r\n--------------------\r\nidentifier              {bootmgr}\r\ndevice                  partition=\\Device\\HarddiskVolume1\r\npath                    \\EFI\\Microsoft\\Boot\\bootmgfw.efi\r\ndescription             Windows Boot Manager\r\nlocale                  tr-TR\r\ninherit                 {globalsettings}\r\ndefault                 {current}\r\nresumeobject            {a04f529d-75ec-11f0-91f9-a71c67db84e2}\r\ndisplayorder            {current}\r\ntoolsdisplayorder       {memdiag}\r\ntimeout                 30\r\n\r\nWindows Boot Loader\r\n-------------------\r\nidentifier              {current}\r\ndevice                  partition=C:\r\npath                    \\WINDOWS\\system32\\winload.efi\r\ndescription             Windows 11\r\nlocale                  tr-TR\r\ninherit                 {bootloadersettings}\r\nrecoverysequence        {a04f529f-75ec-11f0-91f9-a71c67db84e2}\r\ndisplaymessageoverride  Recovery\r\nrecoveryenabled         Yes\r\nisolatedcontext         Yes\r\nallowedinmemorysettings 0x15000075\r\nosdevice                partition=C:\r\nsystemroot              \\WINDOWS\r\nresumeobject            {a04f529d-75ec-11f0-91f9-a71c67db84e2}\r\nnx                      OptIn\r\nbootmenupolicy          Standard\r\nhypervisorlaunchtype    Auto\r\n",

    "Startup":  [
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "MicrosoftEdgeAutoLaunch_B66A0073351CFB9BE40573155D3375D6",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe\" --no-startup-window --win-session-start"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "OneDrive",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft OneDrive\\OneDrive.exe\" /background"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "EpicGamesLauncher",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Epic Games\\Launcher\\Portal\\Binaries\\Win64\\EpicGamesLauncher.exe\" -silent -launchcontext=boot"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "Battle.net",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Battle.net\\Battle.net.exe\" --autostarted"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "Steam",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Steam\\steam.exe\" -silent"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "Opera GX Stable",
                        "Command":  "C:\\Users\\valiantlion\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera GX\\opera.exe"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "Figma Agent",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Users\\valiantlion\\AppData\\Local\\FigmaAgent\\figma_agent.exe\""
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "Free Download Manager",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files\\Softdeluxe\\Free Download Manager\\fdm.exe\" --hidden"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "RiotClient",
                        "Command":  "C:\\Riot Games\\Riot Client\\RiotClientServices.exe --launch-background-mode"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "Opera GX Browser Assistant",
                        "Command":  "C:\\Users\\valiantlion\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera GX\\assistant\\browser_assistant.exe"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "RazerAxon",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Razer\\Razer Axon\\RazerAxon.exe\" -autorun"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "RzAppEngine",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\Program Files\\Razer\\RzAppEngine\\rzappengine.exe\" --start-hidden --url-params=apps=7.1-surround-sound\u0026autoStart=1"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "AMDNoiseSuppression",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\AMD\\ANR\\AMDNoiseSuppression.exe\""
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "Docker Desktop",
                        "Command":  "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "DualSenseX",
                        "Command":  "C:\\Users\\valiantlion\\AppData\\Local\\DualSenseX\\DualSenseX.exe"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "SecurityHealth",
                        "Command":  "C:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\SecurityHealthSystray.exe"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "RtkAudUService",
                        "Command":  "\"C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\DriverStore\\FileRepository\\realtekservice.inf_amd64_9366beb5d0043df3\\RtkAudUService64.exe\" -background"
                    },
                    {
                        "Root":  "HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run",
                        "Name":  "RZSurroundHelper",
                        "Command":  "C:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\RZSurroundHelper.exe"
